description: A connected scatterplot: X is a measure, Y is a template calc (Profit Ratio), Line marks connect the per-member points into a path; color by a dimension, detail by a second dimension.

slots.notes: X axis measure; also a denominator input to the Profit Ratio calc.
numerator input to the Profit Ratio calc (Y axis is the calc, not Profit directly).
detail grain — one point per member; the mark path connects points within a color group.

hazards.detail: Calc formula references bare [Profit]/[Sales]; rewriteFormulaFieldRefs repairs them ONLY because Profit & Sales are bindable bare-key slots. Gate #6 asserts both are bound.

mark='Line' draws a path through the per-member points; the connect order follows the mark/LOD ordering, NOT an explicit sort field. Binding a categorical with no meaningful order yields an arbitrary path.
